jobDescription: Our shipping team has been core to our company’s core strength in selling one-of-a-kind products online. With buyers across 170 countries and sellers across nearly 30 countries, our shipping team is an industry leader in designing a network of global carriers that specialize across different shipping methods, from white glove, freight to parcel. We are looking for a strategic Product Management leader to own our end-to-end shipping experience on 1stdibs. This includes best-in-class buyer experience required for luxury products, and designing world class seller and shipping tools. A critical role in our company, this Senior Product Manager will design a strategic roadmap and partner closely with the shipping operations team and engineering team to execute improvements. In addition, the individual will spearhead cross functional plans to coordinate buyer, seller and internal teams to ensure shipping changes are rolled out successfully. What you’ll do Define requirements, goals and success metrics for each product launch Lead key products & initiatives for 1stdibs’ buyers and sellers around the entire shipping process Define the best possible buyer experience in shipping to build confidence and trust on our marketplace Create scalable workflow tools to support our Logistics operations team Integrate with logistics carriers and vendors around the world Inform product decisions with quantitative and qualitative data on user behavior and experimentation (a/b testing). Integrate user research, market analysis, and community feedback into product requirements Work closely with design, research, engineering to build and iterate on key features. What you’ll bring Have 5-6 years of product management experience in e-commerce. Have experience working in the shipping/delivery buyer experience aspects of e-commerce. Marketplace experience a big plus Are a concise, persuasive and analytical communicator Are a natural collaborator who knows how to drive effective decision-making Are data-driven but able to make smart decisions in the absence of data You’ve helped build and grow an amazing business and products You’ve balanced business needs and strategy with product requirements seamlessly You’ve worked closely as a partner to high-performing engineering, design, research and analytics teams Comfortable with multitasking and can prioritize projects happening in parallel Bachelor’s degree or higher
